Home.heroDescription: Redefining how the world shops — We are more than a shopping platform. With Shpper you can access a new level of products around the world, from offline gems to fresh finds. All through a simple, modern, and trustworthy experience.
Home.discoverCta: Discover how effortless global shopping can be.
Home.howItWorksDescription: Shpper connects people who travel with people who want to access products abroad, strengthened by a reliable handover from our team making global shopping feel seamless yet personal.
Home.step1Description: Browse or create a request for the product you want from anywhere in the world.
Home.step2Description: A traveler picks up your request and confirms the details securely through the app.
Home.step3Description: Once the traveler returns, we coordinate pickup and deliver the item to your door.
Home.step4Description: For luxury or special items, our concierge team handles everything for you.
Home.loyaltyDescription: Earn points as you shop & travel. Climb tiers, unlock perks, and enjoy benefits designed for our most loyal members.
Home.silverDescription: Your starting tier: Unlock instant rewards.
Home.goldDescription: Level up with faster perks & priority benefits.
Home.platinumDescription: Premium advantages for our most active members.
Home.diamondDescription: The highest tier with exclusive VIP privileges.
Home.travelerDescription: Turn your travels into rewards — Join Shpper, pick up items for buyers, and deliver them on your journey. Turn your travels and shopping sprees into earnings.
Home.tripPlannerDescription: Plan and publish your trips so buyers can connect with you.
Home.cockpitDescription: The main hub for travellers to manage trips, requests, and app activity.
Home.requestsDescription: Browse and respond to buyer requests.
Home.globalMarketplaceDescription: Browse unique items from travelers worldwide. Discover local specialties and limited editions.
Home.mobileFirstDescription: Full-featured mobile apps for iOS and Android. Shop and travel on the go.
Home.ecoFriendlyDescription: Sustainable shipping by utilizing existing traveler luggage space.
Home.readyDescription: Join thousands of satisfied customers who trust Shpper for their international shopping needs.
Home.testimonialsDescription: Real stories from buyers and travelers who use Shpper every day.
Home.testimonial1Text: I ordered a limited edition perfume from Paris through Shpper. The traveler was amazing — communicated the whole way. Got it within a week of their return!
Home.testimonial2Text: I travel for work monthly and Shpper lets me earn extra on every trip. The app is easy to use and payments come through quickly after delivery.
Home.testimonial3Text: The concierge service is a game-changer for luxury items. They handled everything — sourcing, quality check, and delivery. Worth every dirham.
Home.testimonial4Text: I use Shpper both ways — as a traveler when I fly and as a buyer when I want something from abroad. The community is genuinely helpful.

About.title: About Us
About.heroTitle: The Future of Personalized Shipping & Shopping
About.heroDescription: Shpper is building a new global ecosystem for shipping and shopping, designed around convenience, community, and effortless access. Our vision is simple: make global access effortless.
About.p2pDescription: Our peer-to-peer network connects people who want to send or receive items with travelers already flying worldwide, by using unused luggage space to create a more sustainable alternative to traditional shipping.
About.shoppingDescription: Our shopping feature allows personal shoppers to bring users unique items and local specialties directly from their destinations. With our upcoming Marketplace, users will soon explore a curated selection of products from trusted sellers — all within the Shpper platform.
About.tagline: We do it for you with love!
About.journeyDescription: What started as an idea in 2022 has grown into a community of people who believe in evolving global shopping. Today, we continue to grow with steady improvements and a clear focus on delivering a better experience for everyone. We're excited for what's ahead — and we'd love for you to be part of it.

Faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
Faq.description: Find answers to common questions about using Shpper, accounts, orders, payments, and platform features.
Faq.buyerQ1: How do I create an Order?
Faq.buyerA1: After you create an account you will be able to create an order in the homepage under 'Create Order' or if it's a luxury or special request you'll have the option 'Concierge'.
Faq.buyerA2: All major credit and debit cards, Apple Pay and Google Pay.
Faq.buyerQ3: How long does the Shipping take?
Faq.buyerA3: We can't guarantee an exact delivery date, as shipping depends on the traveller's return. Once the traveller has returned, the status is updated in the app and we schedule pickup and delivery. We aim to deliver the item as quickly as possible — usually within 1–3 days after the traveller returns.
Faq.buyerA4: Yes! Your order goes through five clear statuses: On the way, Landed, Pickup scheduled, Handed over, and Delivered.
Faq.buyerA5: Yes, within 7 days after the delivery a return can be issued by contacting our team, giving a valid and accepted reason.
Faq.buyerQ6: Can I send multiple requests at once?
Faq.buyerA6: Yes, you can send multiple requests at the same time — either for different items or the same item across multiple trips. If a request doesn't receive an offer within 60 minutes, it will automatically be published to all travellers going to your selected destination.
Faq.buyerQ7: How does the Concierge Service work?
Faq.buyerA7: Our Concierge Service is designed for special requests, such as luxury or high value items, extra-fragile products, or when you simply need help with coordination. This service connects you directly with our team, who will assist you in sourcing and managing your request.
Faq.buyerQ8: Can I cancel an Order once it's been submitted?
Faq.buyerA8: Yes, as a buyer you can request cancellation in the app — just write the reason and the admin or traveler will review it.
Faq.buyerQ9: How does the Personal Shopper get paid?
Faq.buyerA9: Personal Shoppers are registered as travellers in the app and receive their earnings directly through their traveller account. Earnings are agreed upon at the start of each order.
Faq.travelerQ1: How much do I earn per trip?
Faq.travelerA1: There is no fixed earning amount. Earnings depend on what the buyer and traveller agree on for each request. The minimum earning per trip starts at 20 AED, with no maximum limit.
Faq.travelerQ2: When do I get my Commission from the trip?
Faq.travelerA2: Once the item has been delivered to the customer, the total amount — including the item cost and your commission — will be released into the wallet in the app.
Faq.travelerQ3: Where do I see my requests?
Faq.travelerA3: In the app, switch to your Traveller account and tap 'Requests' in the menu bar to view all your direct requests. You can also access them through Request Chats in the chat section.
Faq.travelerQ4: Can I withdraw my earnings to my bank account?
Faq.travelerA4: Yes. Once the funds are released to your wallet, you can withdraw your earnings to your bank account by providing your IBAN number.
Faq.travelerQ5: What happens if I don't find the Requested item?
Faq.travelerA5: You can explain that to the buyer in the chat and cancel the order. If the buyer is online you can ask about alternative products.
Faq.travelerQ6: What happens if the price is different in the store?
Faq.travelerA6: Differences in price can be adjusted after the purchase — provide the receipt and send a payment request to the buyer in the chat or issue a refund.

Contact.title: Contact Us
Contact.subtitle: Have an inquiry? We're here for you.
Contact.description: Reach out anytime — our team is ready to assist with your questions and needs.
Contact.successMessage: Message sent! We'll get back to you soon.

Footer.description: Redefining how the world shops. Connect with travelers worldwide and access unique products seamlessly.
Footer.newsletterDescription: Subscribe to our newsletter for the latest updates and tips.
